'''zhozhawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:waggable|waggable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-zh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waggable|waggable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhozhawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhozhawithi|zhozhawithi]] || [[word:zhozhawiji|zhozhawiji]] || [[word:zhozhawishi|zhozhawishi]] || [[word:zhozhawiki|zhozhawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhozhawuthuthu|zhozhawuthuthu]] || [[word:zhozhawujuju|zhozhawujuju]] || [[word:zhozhawushushu|zhozhawushushu]] || [[word:zhozhawukuku|zhozhawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhozhawuthu|zhozhawuthu]] || [[word:zhozhawuju|zhozhawuju]] || [[word:zhozhawushu|zhozhawushu]] || [[word:zhozhawuku|zhozhawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhozhawufthuf|zhozhawufthuf]] || [[word:zhozhawufjuf|zhozhawufjuf]] || [[word:zhozhawufshuf|zhozhawufshuf]] || [[word:zhozhawufkuf|zhozhawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhozhawethe|zhozhawethe]] || [[word:zhozhaweje|zhozhaweje]] || [[word:zhozhaweshe|zhozhaweshe]] || [[word:zhozhaweke|zhozhaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhozhawothotho|zhozhawothotho]] || [[word:zhozhawojojo|zhozhawojojo]] || [[word:zhozhawoshosho|zhozhawoshosho]] || [[word:zhozhawokoko|zhozhawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhozhawotho|zhozhawotho]] || [[word:zhozhawojo|zhozhawojo]] || [[word:zhozhawosho|zhozhawosho]] || [[word:zhozhawoko|zhozhawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhozhawofthof|zhozhawofthof]] || [[word:zhozhawofjof|zhozhawofjof]] || [[word:zhozhawofshof|zhozhawofshof]] || [[word:zhozhawofkof|zhozhawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhozhawĂŻfthĂŻf|zhozhawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhozhawĂŻfjĂŻf|zhozhawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhozhawĂŻfshĂŻf|zhozhawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhozhawĂŻfkĂŻf|zhozhawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhozhawĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhozhawĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhozhawĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhozhawĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhozhawĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhozhawĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhozhawĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhozhawĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhozhawĂŻfthĂŻf|zhozhawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhozhawĂŻfjĂŻf|zhozhawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhozhawĂŻfshĂŻf|zhozhawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhozhawĂŻfkĂŻf|zhozhawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhozhawĂŻfthĂŻf|zhozhawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhozhawĂŻfjĂŻf|zhozhawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhozhawĂŻfshĂŻf|zhozhawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhozhawĂŻfkĂŻf|zhozhawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhozhawĂŠthĂŠ|zhozhawĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhozhawĂŠjĂŠ|zhozhawĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhozhawĂŠshĂŠ|zhozhawĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhozhawĂŠkĂŠ|zhozhawĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhozhawathatha|zhozhawathatha]] || [[word:zhozhawajaja|zhozhawajaja]] || [[word:zhozhawashasha|zhozhawashasha]] || [[word:zhozhawakaka|zhozhawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhozhawatha|zhozhawatha]] || [[word:zhozhawaja|zhozhawaja]] || [[word:zhozhawasha|zhozhawasha]] || [[word:zhozhawaka|zhozhawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhozhawafthaf|zhozhawafthaf]] || [[word:zhozhawafjaf|zhozhawafjaf]] || [[word:zhozhawafshaf|zhozhawafshaf]] || [[word:zhozhawafkaf|zhozhawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhozhawasha|zhozhawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhozhawshĂ«sha|zhozhawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhozhawrosha|zhozhawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhozhawmusha|zhozhawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhozhawyasha|zhozhawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhozhawnkshĂ«sha|gozhozhawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhozhawnkrosha|gozhozhawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhozhawnkmusha|gozhozhawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhozhawnkyasha|gozhozhawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhozhazhawasha|zhozhazhawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhozhazhawshĂ«sha|zhozhazhawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhozhazhawrosha|zhozhazhawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhozhazhawmusha|zhozhazhawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhozhazhawyasha|zhozhazhawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhozhazhawnkshĂ«sha|gozhozhazhawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhozhazhawnkrosha|gozhozhazhawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhozhazhawnkmusha|gozhozhazhawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhozhazhawnkyasha|gozhozhazhawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhezhĂŠwasha|zhezhĂŠwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhezhĂŠwshĂ«sha|zhezhĂŠwshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhezhĂŠwrosha|zhezhĂŠwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhezhĂŠwmusha|zhezhĂŠwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhezhĂŠwyasha|zhezhĂŠwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhezhĂŠwnkshĂ«sha|gozhezhĂŠwnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhezhĂŠwnkrosha|gozhezhĂŠwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhezhĂŠwnkmusha|gozhezhĂŠwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhezhĂŠwnkyasha|gozhezhĂŠwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhozhfawasha|zhozhfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhozhfawshĂ«sha|zhozhfawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhozhfawrosha|zhozhfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhozhfawmusha|zhozhfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhozhfawyasha|zhozhfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhozhfawnkshĂ«sha|gozhozhfawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhozhfawnkrosha|gozhozhfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhozhfawnkmusha|gozhozhfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhozhfawnkyasha|gozhozhfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
